reviews.comment:
Precios elevadisimos en su servicio de boxes. Termina saliendo mas caro que un service oficial.

(Translated by Google)
Their pit service prices are outrageous. It ends up being more expensive than an official service center.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyOU9TbTJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atencion, total ausencia de los dueños. Los baños nunca estan habilitados, con tanta gente sin trabajo y tienen este tipo de personal. Lamentable

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster, the owners were completely absent. The restrooms are never open, and with so many people out of work, they have staff like this. It's deplorable.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyeE9pTTR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención del personal, servicio de boxes e inflado gratis de Neumáticos, dispensador de agua caliente y hielo adisposición.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent staff service, free pit box service and tire inflation, hot water and ice dispenser available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNraXZYZ3lBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Cada vez que voy a cargar nafta, mínimo 12 minutos de espera. No tiene la culpa el solitario empleado que tiene que atender todos los surtidores. No se explica pq brindan ese pésimo servicio. No vayan !!!

(Translated by Google)
Every time I go to fill up with gas, I wait at least 12 minutes. It's not the fault of the lone employee who has to attend to all the pumps. It's inexplicable why they provide such terrible service. Don't go there!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3118761116116586620/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNXJHMlVBEAE
